name: coex-test
description: Tests daemon coexistence (COEX-01/02): uses test-worker which the daemon could also schedule. Run this while daemon is active to verify pipelineRunId prevents double-scheduling.

stages.name: slow-task
stages.prompt: Write a detailed 5-paragraph essay about the history of coffee brewing methods, from ancient Ethiopian origins through modern espresso machines. Write it to the output file. Take your time and be thorough.
